acceptance_criteria.text: Once a split begins, the catalog record transitions to SPLITTING
New writer requests for the file are queued rather than applied while SPLITTING
Readers holding a pre-split MVCC snapshot continue to see their pinned version unaffected
Exactly one split wins per file (composes with 2b.1.2's guard, not reimplemented)
covered_by: pre-existing TestSplitInProgressCAS (guard_test.go, unmodified, must still pass)

acceptance_criteria.text: Status transitions out of SPLITTING cleanly (no leaked/stuck guard state on the success/abort path this subtask owns)

covered_by: full split package test run (2b.1.1 + 2b.1.2 tests unmodified/still passing)

explicitly_out_of_scope: Wiring AdmitWrite into ContentStore.Append's live write path (future subtask)
Automatic recovery of a SPLITTING record abandoned by a crashed split holder (documented gap, see architecture-discovery.md)
